programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: The Money Pit
programme.desc: A young couple struggles to repair a hopelessly dilapidated house

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain

programme.title: Cities At War - Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin - The Doomed City Berlin was under air attack throughout the war - from the British and the Americans and then the Russians

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt3
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Dogfight - The Mystery of the Red Baron
programme.desc: The corpse-lined trenches of Northern France are well known as one of the deadliest killing grounds of World War I In fact proportionatly an even more lethal war was taking place in the skies over Europe The worlds first flying aces were regarded as the cosseted glamour boys of The Great War But by 1917 the life expectancy of a new pilot was just two weeks

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Shot At Dawn WW1
programme.desc: This touching documentary investigates the tragic stories of the 306 British Commonwealth soldiers shot for acts of cowardice and desertion during World War One

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 2
programme.desc: Battlefield Vietnam 2

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: After a man scorns his lover he resorts to drastic measures to ensure that his family doesnt learn of their affair but his plan hardly goes off without a hitch Later a man literally tries to cheat death

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A wealthy and elderly man subjects himself to a revolutionary new treatment in order to please his gold-digger girlfriend Unfortunately becoming young again turns out to be very expensive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Reno and Sam are a pair of hardcore gamblers who dont play for fun They challenge each other in a simple game of cards and the end result could be deadlier then they couldve ever bargained for

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Forever Knight

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: On Halloween night Micki and Ryan are visited by the ghost of their late uncle who has returned from the underworld

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George drives into a ditch on the McCoys property breaking their water pipe in the process Grampa claims he posted a warning sign but George claims there was no sign A lawsuit ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa manages Georges campaign for town councilman

programme.title: Smart 510
programme.desc: Smart 510

programme.title: Smart 525
programme.desc: Smart 525

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Clint Eastwood moves into the neighborhood Mister Ed sets up a party line with his house which causes nothing but problems for Mr Eastwood

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: A going-on-15-year-old boy-crazy girl has moved into the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: A new prisoner in a corporals uniform turns out to be a general with a mission for Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic

programme.title: Mchale 235
programme.desc: Mchale 235

programme.title: Mchale 336
programme.desc: Mchale 336

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper believes that Gilligan has found The Eye of the Idol which gives him three wishes before sundown However the Professor believes it is just a silly superstition and just an ordinary cats eye

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: When a singer whos suppose to perform at the hotel is sexually assaulted she asks for private investigator So the manager calls Dan She wants Dan to keep it quiet out of fear that it could ruin her career and life So Dan asks Nelson to make it quiet He then goes to a rape counselor who tells Dan that her attacker will do it again What Dan doesnt know is that her attacker could be closer to her than he thinks

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A man collapses at the Harts restaurant table and asks them to protect the man with jade eyes and take him to the temple

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is set to star in a home video version of his self-help plumbing book but the director decides he lacks charisma and replaces him with an actor who knows nothing about plumbing

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Georges only living relative his boorish cousin Eugene comes to visit

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Frances Sandreen a cosmetic mogul hires Mitch Garner and Ryan to investigate her son Todds involvement with a band of roller-skating burglars that have been robbing peoples apartments and slipping away at night

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When a debtor and his friends resort to baseball bats chaos erupts and Lou Lyndah and Sonia fight not only with them but also with each other Down in Texas Matt and Froy wait to clear up Froys warrant and get in way over their heads working for a local repo team Meanwhile Lou decides to re-hire Frankie despite Sonia and Lyndahs objections but first Lou wants to see how Frankie fares when faced with the temptation in the form of strippers and alcohol

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Down in Texas Matt and Froy are staking out a cement mixer but their repo turns disastrous when an innocent bystander gets showered in concrete In LA Frankie takes the reins with an alcoholic debtor and Lou and Sonia deal with a diva who pushes Sonia to her breaking point TV-14-L

programme.title: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren
programme.desc: El Cid 1961 Charlton Heston Sophia Loren

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 223
programme.desc: Hercules 223

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval has a mole attempting to gain information about Liam - particularly concerning his commitment to the Taelons When a Taelon and protector are killed in a portal that malfunctions Liam is suspicious that it was intentional

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Harrison and the team talk to a psychic woman who studied the aliens after the first invasion Meanwhile a group of aliens take over a family and travel cross country in order to awaken more aliens from hibernation

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A transmission from Dr Logan in Texas City leads the Alphans to believe that they can finally land back on Earth through a revolutionary teleportation process The downside is that it is now 2120 on Earth and the surface has become an unbreathable wasteland through centuries of pollution The Alphans though are intent on abandoning the wandering moon However due to a hitch the Alphan test subjects find themselves in a primitive and hostile environment It is Scotland in the fourteenth century where the Scots are at war with the English invaders who kidnap the Alphan trio

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Cody enlists the help of self-proclaimed preacher Gideon Poole but regrets it when he learns the truth about him

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Surveillance is the game here But a break-in ends up with the night watchman dead of a heart attack

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force takes on the absolute ruler of a Middle East nation who is running a secret slave market Barney poses as a slave part of an effort to construct a replica of the slave cells before escaping Phelps poses as a slave trader and Rollin as an Interpol investigator Finally Cinnamon will be the bait for the trap The ruler of the country has a brother who married a British wife Amara The brother if he assumed power would abolish slavery in the country -- but he has accepted assurances that slavery doesnt exist there As part of the plan Willy abducts Amara and she is put in the IMF replica of the slave cell

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles joined on the run by Lt Gerards wife whos had it with being no 2 to a phantom Kimble stumbles signing his own name on a time-sheet which sets off a manhunt while residents battle a flood Gerard Barry Morse drags his wife off of their vacation to join the hounds With many roads out of the Midwest city under water Marie Gerard Barbara Rush and Kimble David Janssen end up on the same Eastbound bus

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Scouting for the army Cheyenne reports of an impending attack Fleeing to another fort the commanding officers route to that fort seems more dangerous than the alternate and Cheyenne isnt the only one who disagrees

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Noah is taken into slavery when he tries to free his former teacher Calvin Roundtree

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coming from a history of drinking heavily and drug abuse, Nick Burnham was able to turn his life around completely by prioritizing his MMA training. Now, at HK38, Nick is looking to take the Lightweight title away from Dauda Keita in a fight that goes the distance!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some of the best finishes from 'Shock N Awe'.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Alex Lohore v. Tommy Gunn

programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dr Wily creates an android that is a replica of Kevins worst enemy from high school

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain challenges the N-Team to an athletic competition on Mount Icarus thus distracting them from stopping her from finding the Three Sacred Treasures

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Hank Sheila Presto Eric and Diana are captured by Venger and thrown into a volcanic prison Its up to Bobby to save them with some help from one of Vengers unwilling servants

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brain are warned that MAD plan to steal rare pieces of art from the Modern Art Museum in New York and replace them with fakes
